query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.title,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lesson_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as quiz_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
